examples.title: E-Waste Collection Management System
examples.description: Algorithm for managing e-waste collection from households using D2C model
examples.code:
// E-Waste Collection Management System
BEGIN
 INPUT: Household e-waste items list
 
 FUNCTION registerHousehold():
 householdID = generateID()
 address = getAddress()
 phone = getContact()
 INSERT INTO database(householdID, address, phone)
 RETURN householdID
 
 FUNCTION schedulePickup(householdID, items):
 FOR each item IN items:
 IF item.isHazardous THEN
 flag = "HAZARDOUS"
 ELSE
 flag = "NON_HAZARDOUS"
 END IF
 END FOR
 pickupDate = assignRoute()
 RETURN pickupDate
 
 FUNCTION processCollection(pickupID):
 weight = weighItems()
 category = categorizeItems()
 IF category == "reusable" THEN
 sendToDonationCenter()
 ELSE IF category == "recyclable" THEN
 routeToCertifiedRecycler()
 ELSE
 routeToSafeDisposal()
 END IF
 UPDATE database(status="processed")
 
 // Main Execution
 WHILE systemActive:
 household = registerHousehold()
 items = receiveItems()
 pickup = schedulePickup(household.id, items)
 processCollection(pickup.id)
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a D2C (Door-to-Collector) e-waste collection system where households register, schedule pickups, and items are categorized for proper disposal routes - reuse, recycling, or safe disposal.
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) for storing n household records

examples.title: E-Waste Recycling Process Algorithm
examples.description: Step-by-step procedure for material recovery from e-waste
examples.code:
// E-Waste Recycling - Material Recovery Process
BEGIN
 INPUT: Mixed e-waste items
 
 // Stage 1: Sorting
 FUNCTION sortByType(items):
 FOR each item IN items:
 IF item.type == "metal" THEN
 addToBin(metal)
 ELSE IF item.type == "plastic" THEN
 addToBin(plastic)
 ELSE IF item.type == "glass" THEN
 addToBin(glass)
 ELSE
 addToBin(mixed)
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 // Stage 2: Magnetic Separation
 FUNCTION magneticSeparation(metalBin):
 ferrous = extractWithMagnet()
 nonFerrous = remaining()
 RETURN ferrous, nonFerrous
 
 // Stage 3: Density Separation
 FUNCTION densitySeparation(nonFerrous):
 aluminum = separateByDensity(threshold=2.7)
 copper = separateByDensity(threshold=8.9)
 RETURN aluminum, copper
 
 // Stage 4: Chemical Recovery (for precious metals)
 FUNCTION chemicalRecovery(electronicComponents):
 gold = leachWithCyanide()
 silver = leachWithNitricAcid()
 RETURN gold, silver
 
 // Stage 5: Plastic Processing
 FUNCTION processPlastic(plasticBin):
 shred()
 wash()
 melt()
 moldIntoPellets()
 RETURN recycledPlastic
 
 // Main Process Flow
 FUNCTION startRecycling(eWaste):
 sortByType(eWaste)
 metals = magneticSeparation(metalBin)
 separated = densitySeparation(metals.nonFerrous)
 precious = chemicalRecovery(components)
 plastic = processPlastic(plasticBin)
 glass = processGlass(glassBin)
 
 RETURN materialsRecovered
 
 // Execute
 eWaste = INPUT
 materials = startRecycling(eWaste)
 OUTPUT materials
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm shows the multi-stage recycling process: sorting by type, magnetic separation for iron, density separation for non-ferrous metals, chemical leaching for precious metals, and plastic reprocessing.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n log n) for sorting + O(m) for processing
examples.spaceComplexity: O(n) for temporary storage at each stage

examples.title: E-Waste Management Decision Tree
examples.description: Algorithm to determine appropriate action for received e-waste item
examples.code:
// E-Waste Disposal Decision Algorithm
BEGIN
 FUNCTION classifyItem(item):
 // Check if item is functional
 IF item.isFunctional == TRUE THEN
 // Check if upgrade possible
 IF item.upgradeCost < item.recyclingValue THEN
 RETURN "REFURBISH"
 ELSE
 RETURN "REUSE_DONATE"
 END IF
 ELSE
 // Item is non-functional
 // Check for hazardous components
 IF item.hasHazardousComponents == TRUE THEN
 // Check if recycler is certified
 IF recycler.isCPCBApproved == TRUE THEN
 RETURN "CERTIFIED_RECYCLING"
 ELSE
 RETURN "SAFE_STORAGE"
 END IF
 ELSE
 // Non-hazardous recyclable
 IF item.preciousMetalContent > threshold THEN
 RETURN "PRECIOUS_METAL_RECOVERY"
 ELSE
 RETURN "STANDARD_RECYCLING"
 END IF
 END IF
 END IF
 
 FUNCTION executeAction(item, classification):
 SWITCH classification:
 CASE "REFURBISH":
 performUpgrade(item)
 sellRefurbished(item)
 CASE "REUSE_DONATE":
 donateToCharity(item)
 CASE "CERTIFIED_RECYCLING":
 sendToCPCBRecycler(item)
 CASE "PRECIOUS_METAL_RECOVERY":
 sendToSpecialistRefinery(item)
 CASE "STANDARD_RECYCLING":
 sendToStandardRecycler(item)
 CASE "SAFE_STORAGE":
 storeInSecureFacility(item)
 END SWITCH
 
 // Main Loop
 WHILE newItemArrives:
 item = receiveItem()
 action = classifyItem(item)
 executeAction(item, action)
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: This decision tree algorithm helps categorize e-waste items into appropriate handling paths based on functionality, hazardous content, and value, ensuring maximum recovery and minimum environmental impact.
